Notes: Wayne State off to 7-0 start for first time since 1974-75...
Mara Hjelle had 19 points for WSC, Ashley Arlen had her third double-
double of the season with 14 points and 12 rebounds..Liz Sipma had 18
Game.Officials: Amy Brighton, Jeff Sylliaasen, Jon Garrow
